headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Overweight on Federal Realty Investment, Raises Price Target to $134
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Cooper Clark   maintains Federal Realty Investment (NYSE:FRT) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $129 to $134.
